            "text": "// Invoke 执行 Agent 工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "func (a *UIDesignSystemAgent) Invoke(ctx context.Context, query string) (*schema.Message, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "\tmessages := []*schema.Message{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t\tschema.UserMessage(query),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\treturn a.agent.Invoke(ctx, messages)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "// getSystemPrompt 获取系统提示词"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "func getSystemPrompt() string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\treturn &#96;You are a UI/UX Design System Generator Agent. Your task is to help users generate complete design systems for their projects."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "Workflow:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "1. **Analyze Requirements**: Extract key information from user request:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "   - Product type (SaaS, e-commerce, portfolio, dashboard, landing page, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "   - Style keywords (minimal, playful, professional, elegant, dark mode, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "   - Industry (healthcare, fintech, gaming, education, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "   - Stack (React, Vue, Next.js, or default to html-tailwind)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "2. **Generate Design System** (REQUIRED): Always start by calling generate_design_system tool with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "   - query: User's product description and requirements"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "   - project_name: Project name if provided"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "3. **Supplement with Detailed Searches** (if needed): After getting the design system, use ui_ux_search tool to get additional details:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "   - More style options: domain=\"style\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "   - Chart recommendations: domain=\"chart\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "   - UX best practices: domain=\"ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "   - Alternative fonts: domain=\"typography\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "   - Landing structure: domain=\"landing\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "4. **Stack Guidelines** (if stack specified): Use ui_ux_search with stack parameter to get implementation-specific best practices."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "5. **Persist Design System** (if requested): If user wants to save the design system, call persist_design_system tool."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "Always provide comprehensive, actionable design system recommendations based on the generated results.&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package ui_ux"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"os\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"strings\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\topenaiModel \"github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "// NewChatModelFromConfig 从配置创建 ChatModel（参考 DigFlow 的配置方式）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "// 根据 config.yaml 中的 ChatModel.Type 选择对应的模型提供商"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "func NewChatModelFromConfig(ctx context.Context) (model.ChatModel, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tchatModelCfg := cfg.ChatModel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t// 处理环境变量（参考 DigFlow 的 processEnvVars）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\tprocessedConfig := processEnvVars(chatModelCfg.Config)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tswitch strings.ToLower(chatModelCfg.Type) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\tcase \"qwen\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t\treturn newQwenModel(ctx, processedConfig)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\tcase \"openai\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\t\treturn newOpenAIModel(ctx, processedConfig)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\tdefault:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"unsupported chat model type: %s. Supported: qwen, openai\", chatModelCfg.Type)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "// processEnvVars 处理环境变量（参考 DigFlow 的实现）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "// 支持 ${VAR_NAME} 格式的环境变量替换"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "func processEnvVars(config map[string]interface{}) map[string]interface{} {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tresult := make(map[string]interface{})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\tfor k, v := range config {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\t\tif str, ok := v.(string); ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t\t\t// 如果是环境变量格式 ${VAR_NAME}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t\t\tif len(str) \u003e 3 \u0026\u0026 str[:2] == \"${\" \u0026\u0026 str[len(str)-1:] == \"}\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tenvKey := str[2 : len(str)-1]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif envVal := os.Getenv(envKey); envVal != \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tresult[k] = envVal"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tresult[k] = str"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tresult[k] = v"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\t\tresult[k] = v"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\treturn result"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "// getString 获取字符串配置值"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "func getString(config map[string]interface{}, key string, defaultValue string) string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\tif val, ok := config[key]; ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\tif str, ok := val.(string); ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn str"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\treturn defaultValue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "// getFloat32Ptr 获取 float32 指针配置值"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "func getFloat32Ptr(config map[string]interface{}, key string, defaultValue float32) *float32 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\tif val, ok := config[key]; ok"
          }
        ],

          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package learning"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/google/uuid\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "// LLMClient 可选：由宿主注入以实现结构化决策；未配置时走规则引擎。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "type LLMClient interface {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\tEvaluateLearning(ctx context.Context, rc *RunContext, cfg Config) (*LearningDecision, error)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "// DecisionEngine 产出 LearningDecision。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "type DecisionEngine interface {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tEvaluate(ctx context.Context, rc *RunContext, cfg Config) (*LearningDecision, error)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "// DefaultDecisionEngine 规则 + 可选 LLM。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "type DefaultDecisionEngine struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tLLM LLMClient"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "// Evaluate 应用门槛规则；若配置了 LLM 则优先使用 LLM 结果并做校验。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "func (e *DefaultDecisionEngine) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, rc *RunContext, cfg Config) (*LearningDecision, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\tif rc == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"learning: nil RunContext\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tnow := time.Now()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tif rc.CreatedAt != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\t\tnow = *rc.CreatedAt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tdec := \u0026LearningDecision{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\t\tDecisionID:      uuid.New().String(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:         rc.AppName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\t\tRunID:           rc.RunID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t\tSessionID:       rc.SessionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID:     rc.ExecutionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t\tTerminalOutcome: rc.TerminalOutcome,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t\tReason:          \"rule_prefilter\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\t\tConfidence:      0.5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t\tCreatedAt:       now,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\t\tMemoryActions:   nil,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\tSkillActions:    nil,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\tif e != nil \u0026\u0026 e.LLM != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t\tllmDec, err := e.LLM.EvaluateLearning(ctx, rc, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\t\tif llmDec != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\t\tdec = sanitizeDecision(llmDec, rc, now)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\tapplyRuleFilters(rc, cfg, dec)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\treturn dec, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "func sanitizeDecision(in *LearningDecision, rc *RunContext, now time.Time)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 74,
            "line": 63
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./learning/engine.go",

          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "func processOne(ctx context.Context, ev LearningEvent) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\tcfg := effectiveConfig()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\tif !cfg.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\th := getHost()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\tif h == nil || h.Audit == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\texists, err := h.Audit.Exists(ctx, ev.ExecutionID, ev.TerminalOutcome)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\tif err == nil \u0026\u0026 exists {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\tif !deduper.TryClaim(ev.ExecutionID, ev.TerminalOutcome) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\tvar rc *RunContext"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\tif h.RunContextProvider != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t\tvar gerr error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\t\trc, gerr = h.RunContextProvider.GetRunContext(ctx, ev)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\t\tif gerr != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t\t\trc = minimalRunContext(ev)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\tif rc == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\t\trc = minimalRunContext(ev)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\tengine := getEngine()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\tdec, err := engine.Evaluate(ctx, rc, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\tif err := h.Audit.SaveDecision(ctx, dec); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\tswitch cfg.ExecutionPhase {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\tcase PhaseAuditOnly:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\t\t// 仅审计"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\tcase PhaseMemory:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\t\tapplyMemory(ctx, h, rc, dec, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "\tcase PhaseSkill:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\t\tapplyMemory(ctx, h, rc, dec, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\t\tapplySkill(ctx, h, rc, dec, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\tdefault:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\t\tapplyMemory(ctx, h, rc, dec, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\t\tapplySkill(ctx, h, rc, dec, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "\t_ = h.Audit.MarkApplied(ctx, dec.DecisionID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "func minimalRunContext(ev LearningEvent) *RunContext {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026RunContext{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:         ev.AppName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "\t\tRunID:           ev.RunID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID:     ev.ExecutionID,"

          {

          },
          {

            "text": "\t\tTerminalOutcome: ev.TerminalOutcome,"

            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172
          },

            "text": "\twrapped := \"\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\u003chtml\u003e\u003chead\u003e\u003cmeta charset=\\\"utf-8\\\"\u003e\u003c/head\u003e\u003cbody\u003e\u003cdiv id=\\\"__uiux_root\\\"\u003e\" +"

          },

          {

            "text": "\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"internal: uiux root wrapper missing\")"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "\tif p.Selector == \"\" {"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "\tsel := root.Find(p.Selector)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "\tif sel.Length() == 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"selector %q matches no elements\", p.Selector)"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "\t\tif utf8.RuneCountInString(req.Content) \u003e maxTextLength {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "\t\t\tparts := splitMsg(req.Content, maxTextLength)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "\t\t\tfor _, part := range parts {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tbody := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\"msgtype\": \"text\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\"text\":    map[string]string{\"content\": part},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif err := sendWeComMessageAPI(ctx, req.AccessToken, agentID, req.UserID, body); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{Success: true, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送 %d 条消息\", len(parts))}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "\t\tbody := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"msgtype\": \"text\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"text\":    map[string]string{\"content\": req.Content},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "\t\tif err := sendWeComMessageAPI(ctx, req.AccessToken, agentID, req.UserID, body); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{Success: true, Message: \"消息发送成功\"}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "\t// 内部 token：使用 go-workwx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "\tapp, err := getWeComApp(req.AgentID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{}, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "\trecipient := \u0026workwx.Recipient{UserIDs: []string{req.UserID}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "\tif utf8.RuneCountInString(req.Content) \u003e maxTextLength"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "WeCom:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  Enabled: false                    # 是否启用企业微信推送功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "  CorpID: \"\"                        # 企业微信 CorpID（我的企业 \u003e 企业信息）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "  QYAPIHost: \"https://qyapi.weixin.qq.com\"  # 企业微信 API 地址（可选，支持自定义域名）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wecom/access_token.json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "  Callback:                         # 客服回调配置（用于接收个人微信用户发送的消息）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    Enabled: false                  # 是否启用回调接收消息功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    URL: \"\"                         # 回调 URL（如：https://your-domain.com/api/v1/wecom/callback）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    Token: \"\"                       # 回调 Token（企业微信管理后台配置）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    EncodingAESKey: \"\"             # 回调消息加密密钥（企业微信管理后台配置，43位Base64编码）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    Path: \"/api/v1/wecom/callback\" # 回调路径（相对路径，用于路由注册）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  Applications:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    - AgentID: 0                    # 企业微信应用 ID（应用管理 \u003e 自建应用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "      AgentSecret: \"\"               # 应用 Secret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "      ManageAllKFSession: false     # 是否管理所有客服会话（用于 send_wecom_customer_message 发给个人微信）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "ChatModel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\"                      # 模型类型: qwen, openai"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  Config:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"\"                       # API Key（支持环境变量 ${API_KEY}）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\"                # 模型名称"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"  # API 地址"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    # Temperature: 0.7               # 可选：温度参数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    # MaxTokens: 2048                 # 可选：最大 token 数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "UIUX:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "  Storage:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    BaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\"     # 设计系统存储基础目录"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 81
          },

            "line": 53

      "score": 0.19479429721832275
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "### 2.1 多轮对话与限制说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "**客服消息**（&#96;kf/send_msg&#96;）支持多轮对话：用户主动发消息后 48 小时内，企业可回复最多 5 条；用户继续发消息可再次回复。适合对话式客服场景。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "**员工发客户**（&#96;add_msg_template&#96;）不支持多轮：无论单独发 1 个还是群发多个，都走群发流程，受「每位客户每天 1 条」限制，是单向群发，非对话模式。企业微信目前没有服务端「员工-客户单聊即时发送」API。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "**多轮对话的实现**：真正的多轮需员工在企微客户端与客户聊天，或通过「聊天工具栏」等客户端接口，无服务端 API。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "### 2.2 chatgpt-wechat-main 对客服消息限制的处理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "chatgpt-wechat-main 实现了客服消息，其处理方式如下："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "- **48 小时**：无显式校验。回复均由用户消息触发（&#96;DealUserLastMessageByToken&#96; → &#96;CustomerCallLogic&#96;），用户发新消息即刷新 48 小时窗口，天然满足。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "- **5 条**：有意识规避，但无条数统计。做法包括："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "  - 注释「我们已经收到了您的请求正在处理中...」「语音识别成功」等中间提示，减少冗余消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "  - 客服消息不开启 debug 模式（代码注释：&#96;客服消息不开启 debug 模式，因为响应条数 5条的限制&#96;）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "  - 流式回复仍会拆分长文本为多条发送，超 5 条时可能被企微拒绝，无显式计数或截断"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "## 三、企业微信官方能力"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "### 1. 服务端 API（推荐）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "**创建企业群发**（path 92698）："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "- 接口：&#96;POST /cgi-bin/externalcontact/add_msg_template&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "- 用途：创建群发任务，指定成员向其客户发送消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "- 权限：需「客户联系」功能及对应 secret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "流程："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "1. 调用 &#96;add_msg_template&#96; 创建群发任务（含 sender、external_userid、消息内容）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "2. 调用 &#96;get_groupmsg_list_v2&#96; 获取任务状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "3. 可选：&#96;send_groupmsg&#96; 提醒成员发送"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "### 2. 客户联系 Secret 获取"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "- 路径：企业微信管理后台 → 客户联系 → 客户 → API"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "- 字段：客户联系 Secret（与自建应用 Secret 不同）"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 84
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 43
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/企业微信员工发客户消息方案.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.19247379899024963
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "// CustomerMessage 客服消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "type CustomerMessage struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "\tMsgID          string       &#96;json:\"msgid\"&#96;           // 消息ID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "\tOpenKfId       string       &#96;json:\"open_kfid\"&#96;      // 客服账号ID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "\tExternalUserID string       &#96;json:\"external_userid\"&#96; // 外部联系人ID（客户）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "\tSendTime       int64        &#96;json:\"send_time\"&#96;       // 发送时间"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "\tOrigin         int          &#96;json:\"origin\"&#96;         // 消息来源（3=客户发送）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "\tServicerUserID string       &#96;json:\"servicer_userid,omitempty\"&#96; // 客服userid（可选）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "\tMsgType        string       &#96;json:\"msgtype\"&#96;        // 消息类型：text, image, voice, video, file, location, link, business_card, miniprogram, msgmenu, event"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "\tText           *TextMessage &#96;json:\"text,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "\tImage          *MediaMessage &#96;json:\"image,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "\tVoice          *MediaMessage &#96;json:\"voice,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "\tVideo          *MediaMessage &#96;json:\"video,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "\tFile           *MediaMessage &#96;json:\"file,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "\tLocation       *LocationMessage &#96;json:\"location,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "\tLink           *LinkMessage &#96;json:\"link,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "\tBusinessCard   *BusinessCardMessage &#96;json:\"business_card,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "\tMiniprogram    *MiniprogramMessage &#96;json:\"miniprogram,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "\tMsgMenu        *MsgMenuMessage &#96;json:\"msgmenu,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "\tEvent          *EventMessage &#96;json:\"event,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "// TextMessage 文本消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "type TextMessage struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "\tContent string &#96;json:\"content\"&#96; // 消息内容"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "\tMenuID  string &#96;json:\"menu_id,omitempty\"&#96; // 菜单ID（可选）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "// MediaMessage 媒体消息（图片、语音、视频、文件）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "type MediaMessage struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "\tMediaID string &#96;json:\"media_id\"&#96; // 媒体ID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "// LocationMessage 位置消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "type LocationMessage struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "\tLatitude  float64 &#96;json:\"latitude\"&#96;  // 纬度"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "\tLongitude float64 &#96;json:\"longitude\"&#96; // 经度"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "\tName      string  &#96;json:\"name\"&#96;      // 位置名称"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "\tAddress   string  &#96;json:\"address\"&#96;   // 地址"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "// LinkMessage 链接消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "type LinkMessage struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "\tTitle       string &#96;json:\"title\"&#96;        // 标题"
          }
        ],
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package ui_ux"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/compose\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// UIDesignSystemAgent UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "// 这是一个编排的 Agent，内部使用工具来完成设计系统生成工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "type UIDesignSystemAgent struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\tagent compose.Runnable[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgent 创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "// 需要传入 ChatModel，Agent 内部会使用工具进行工作流编排"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (*UIDesignSystemAgent, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\t// 准备工具集"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tallTools := []tool.BaseTool{}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t// 1. UI/UX 搜索工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\tsearchTool, err := NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t\tallTools = append(allTools, searchTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t// 2. 设计系统生成工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tdesignSystemTool, err := NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\t\tallTools = append(allTools, designSystemTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\t// 3. 持久化工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\tpersistTool, err := NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t\tallTools = append(allTools, persistTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t// 4. 添加外部传入的额外工具（如其他项目工具）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\tallTools = append(allTools, additionalTools...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
DigEino is a Go library/framework built on CloudWeGo Eino. DigEino includes many InvokableTool implementations under `tools/`, uses Markdown for research pipelines, but lacks a unified assistant message renderer. The user wants a general-purpose way to render LLM chat output like MD, code, and thinking.

Plan structured in three layers:

- Clarify "tool" meaning: Registering a `render_chat` tool in Eino has limited value; better to provide a library with optional CLI/HTTP for host applications.
- Core capability: A `render` package or `tools/render/` for rendering chat outputs.</details></think>

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="create_plan">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **create_plan**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "name": "LLM 聊天内容渲染",
  "overview": "在 DigEino 中新增一层与业务无关的「助手输出解析 + 可选导出」能力：以 Go 包为核心，按需暴露 Eino 工具（写入可打开的 HTML/JSON 工件），而不是指望模型在对话里调用工具来「给自己排版」。",
  "plan": "# DigEino 通用 LLM 聊天内容渲染方案\n\n## 背景与定位\n\n- 当前仓库是 Go 模块 [&#96;go.mod&#96;](file:///Users/dig/Documents/文稿%20-%20XinYe%E7%9A%84MacBook%20Pro%20(5)/Projects/go-app/DigEino/go.mod)，工具通过 [&#96;tools/tools.go&#96;](file:///Users/dig/Documents/文稿%20-%20XinYe%E7%9A%84MacBook%20Pro%20(5)/Projects/go-app/DigEino/tools/tools.go) 聚合；消息形态以 &#96;github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema.Message&#96; 为主，观测侧序列化见 [&#96;webhook/status_collector.go&#96;](file:///Users/dig/Documents/文稿%20-%20XinYe%E7%9A%84MacBook%20Pro%20(5)/Projects/go-app/DigEino/webhook/status_collector.go)（&#96;role&#96; / &#96;content&#96; / &#96;tool_calls&#96;）。\n- 「渲染」本质是**宿主侧**问题：把模型返回的**原始字符串**变成结构化块（思考、Markdown 正文、代码围栏、工具调用摘要等），再交给 Web/桌面/企微等不同通道展示。\n- **不建议**把「纯排版」做成模型必调用的 Agent 工具：模型一般不会、也不需要为了显示而多一轮 tool call；更有价值的是 **库 + 可选导出工具**（与现有 [&#96;tools/ui_ux/preview_*&#96;](file:///Users/dig/Documents/文稿%20-%20XinYe%E7%9A%84MacBook%20Pro%20(5)/Projects/go-app/DigEino/tools/ui_ux/preview_runtime.go) 写入 &#96;tempstorage&#96; 的模式一致）。\n\n## 目标能力（产品层）\n\n| 能力 | 说明 |\n|------|------|\n| 分块解析 | 从 &#96;content&#96; 中切出：普通 Markdown 段落、围栏代码（语言 + 文本）、可选「思考/推理」区（可配置标签或前缀，兼容常见模型格式） |\n| 稳定 JSON | 输出 &#96;[]Block&#96;（类型 + 元数据 + 原文），便于任意前端（React/Vue/终端）消费 |\n| 可选静态 HTML | 生成自包含或半自包含 HTML（Markdown→HTML + 代码高亮），写入 [&#96;tempstorage&#96;](file:///Users/dig/Documents/文稿%20-%20XinYe%E7%9A%84MacBook%20Pro%20(5)/Projects/go-app/DigEino/tempstorage/tempstorage.go) 供本地打开或挂链接 |\n| 与 Eino 消息对齐 | 输入可为 &#96;string&#96;，或 &#96;*schema.Message&#96;（自动拆 &#96;content&#96; + 附带 &#96;tool_calls&#96; 摘要块） |\n\n## 推荐架构\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart LR\n  raw[RawAssistantContent]\n  parser[render.Parse]\n  blocks[BlockJSON]\n  html[ToHTML_optional]\n  tool[Optional_EinoTool_WriteArtifact]\n  raw --\u003e parser --\u003e blocks\n  blocks --\u003e html\n  blocks --\u003e tool\n  html --\u003e temp[tempstorage_path]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n- **核心**：新建包 &#96;render/&#96;（或 &#96;pkg/render/&#96;，与现有 &#96;tools/*&#96; 区分：前者是**无 Eino 依赖的纯库**，后者再包一层 &#96;InferTool&#96;）。\n- **解析策略**：先用**基于围栏与标签的扫描器**（正则/小状态机），避免误把代码块里的 Markdown 当标题；思考区用**可配置**规则（例如 &#96;&#96;、&#96;\u003cthink\u003e&#96;、厂商自定义标签）。\n- **HTML 路径**（若做）：Go 侧推荐 &#96;goldmark&#96; + &#96;chromawriter&#96;（或仅输出结构让前端 &#96;shiki&#96;/&#96;highlight.js&#96; 渲染），并对最终 HTML 做 **sanitize**（例如 &#96;bluemonday&#96;），防止模型输出中的 HTML 注入。\n- **可选 Eino 工具**（与「预览 zip」同类）：例如 &#96;write_llm_transcript_html&#96;：入参 &#96;title&#96; + &#96;content&#96;（或 &#96;messages&#96; JSON），出参 &#96;relative_path&#96; / &#96;artifact_id&#96;，便于 Agent 把长报告落到可分享文件；默认**不**加入 &#96;BaseTools&#96;，由集成方显式注入，避免工具列表膨胀。\n\n## 与现有代码的衔接\n\n- **Webhook / 观测**：可在 [&#96;marshalAny&#96;](file:///Users/dig/Documents/文稿%20-%20XinYe%E7%9A%84MacBook%20Pro%20(5)/Projects/go-app/DigEino/webhook/status_collector.go) 之后由调用方选用 &#96;render.Parse&#96;，把 &#96;content&#96; 扩展为 &#96;blocks&#96; 字段（可选开关，避免 payload 变大）。\n- **企业微信等受限通道**：同一套 &#96;[]Block&#96; 上增加 &#96;ToPlainText()&#96; 或「仅保留正文 Markdown」策略，与 [&#96;tools/wx&#96;](file:///Users/dig/Documents/文稿%20-%20XinYe%E7%9A%84MacBook%20Pro%20(5)/Projects/go-app/DigEino/tools/wx) 推送格式要求对齐（不强行 HTML）。\n\n## 实施阶段（建议）\n\n1. **Phase A — 解析库**：&#96;render&#96; 包 + 单元测试（覆盖嵌套围栏、空思考、多段代码、混合中英文）。\n2. **Phase B — HTML 导出（可选）**：&#96;ToHTML&#96; + &#96;WriteChatHTML(ctx, ...)&#96; 复用 &#96;tempstorage&#96; 与路径校验惯例。\n3. **Phase C — Eino 工具（可选）**：&#96;InferTool&#96; 包装写入动作；文档说明「供工作流导出，非对话内必调」。\n\n## 风险与约束\n\n- **模型格式漂移**：思考标签需配置化，并在文档中列出已测试的提供商格式。\n- **体积与隐私**：导出 HTML 可能含敏感内容，路径与权限需与现有 &#96;tempstorage&#96; 策略一致。\n- **不要与 &#96;tools/ui_ux/reasoning.go&#96; 混淆**：后者是 UI 设计规则引擎 CSV，与 LLM 聊天渲染无关。\n\n## 结论\n\n**可以**在 DigEino 里做这件事；更合理的形态是 **「render 核心库 + 可选导出工具」**，而不是单独指望一个 Agent 在对话里调用「渲染工具」来完成 UI。若你方主要消费方是 **Web 聊天窗**，Phase A 的 &#96;[]Block&#96; JSON 往往足够；若需要 **一键可打开的报告页**，再加 Phase B/C。\n",
  "todos": [
    {

    }
  ]
}

_**User**_

stream现在常规的市面上的渲染是采用什么逻辑？

---

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Streaming LLM output is typically rendered in real-time, with tokens or chunks displayed as they are generated. Common patterns include:

- Real-time display of tokens as they are produced by the model
- Progressive rendering where output appears incrementally
- Use of buffering to optimize performance while maintaining responsiveness
- Implementation of backpressure mechanisms to manage data flow

These approaches ensure efficient and responsive user experience during generation. Streaming LLM output is typically rendered in real-time, with tokens or chunks displayed as they are generated. Common patterns include:

- Real-time display of tokens as they are produced by the model
- Progressive rendering where output appears incrementally
- Use of buffering to optimize performance while maintaining responsiveness
- Implementation of backpressure mechanisms to manage data flow

These approaches ensure efficient and responsive user experience during generation.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

市面上「流式 + 聊天渲染」常见做法可以概括成下面几层逻辑（和是否用 DigEino 无关，主要是**前端/宿主**怎么接 SSE/WebSocket 的 token 流）。

## 1. 传输与缓冲

- **服务端**：把模型 token（或按句/按段）推给客户端。
- **客户端**：维护一个**持续增长字符串缓冲区**（当前这条 assistant 消息的 `content`），每个 chunk 只做 `buffer += chunk`，界面绑定这个 buffer。

## 2. Markdown：增量怎么画

没有单一标准，常见三类：

**A. 全文反复解析（简单、多用）**  
每个 chunk 到来后，用 Markdown 解析器把**当前整段 buffer** 转成 HTML/AST 再渲染。  
- 优点：实现快。  
- 缺点：未闭合的 `**`、未写完的链接、**未闭合的代码围栏**会导致中间态闪烁或样式乱跳。

**B. 只渲染「稳定前缀」+ 尾部纯文本（更稳）**  
用启发式规则：从开头扫描，**只把「结构已闭合」的部分**交给 MD 渲染；剩下尾巴当「正在输入」的纯文本或等下一个 chunk。  
- 代码块往往在**遇到闭合的 \`\`\`** 之后才做高亮，避免半段代码乱着色。

**C. 分块管线（AST/增量 remark 等）**  
用 AST 或流式 Markdown 库，尽量做**增量更新**而不是每次从零 parse 整篇。工程量大，产品里相对少，更多在编辑器类场景。

## 3. 思考 / 推理（reasoning）流

- 若模型把思考放在单独字段或标签里：很多产品会**单独缓冲**（例如折叠面板），与「对用户可见正文」分开更新，避免思考内容干扰正文排版。  
- 若全混在一个字符串里：会和正文共用 buffer，但 UI 上仍常**按标签切分**后分区域渲染（标签未闭合时同样用「稳定前缀」思路）。

## 4. 代码高亮

- **流式过程中**：常显示为等宽纯文本，或只做轻量规则。  
- **围栏闭合后**：再跑一次高亮（Shiki / Highlight.js / Prism），避免半截代码被错误 tokenize。

## 5. 工程上的「常规默认」

综合起来，**最常见**的是：**字符串缓冲 + 周期性/每帧对整段做 MD 渲染，并对代码块、列表等用简单启发式减少闪烁**；做得好的产品会再加 **稳定前缀** 或 **思考区与正文分离缓冲**。

若你希望把「流式策略」写进 DigEino 计划（例如：库只保证**完整 content** 的 `Parse`，流式由宿主用前缀启发式），可以说一声，我可以按你的偏好改计划文档；当前这条仅作行业惯例说明，不自动改计划。

### 共同约定

- 渲染**不是** Tool；在 **流式结束**（或 Invoke 拿到终态）后，对**一整段助手文本**调用 `render.Parse`。

- 任意节点、Supervisor 汇总、HTTP 出口里，只要有 **最终要展示的 UTF-8 字符串**，直接：

`render.Parse(assistantPlainText, render.Options{...})`

- **不 import eino**，最适合以后把 `render` 拆成独立开源模块；DigFlow 怎么编排都行。

### 方式二：基于 Eino（接在最后一个 ChatModel / Agent 后面）

- 图里在输出 `*schema.Message` 的节点后加一个 **Lambda / 后处理节点**。
- 用薄适配（计划里示例：`MessageToRenderableText`）把 `Content` 和可选的 `ToolCalls` 拼成一段字符串，再 **`render.Parse`**。
- 也可以在外层 **包装 `Invoke` 的返回值**，把 `[]Block` 放进你们自己的 `Result` DTO。

### 和 DigFlow 的关系一句话

DigFlow 仍是 Eino 编排；**对接点只有「终态字符串 → Parse」**——字符串要么编排里已经拼好（方式一），要么从 `schema.Message` 适配出来（方式二）。

按当前架构约定（并已写进计划里的 **「DigEino 仓库内路径约定」**）：

### `render` 放哪里

- **位置**：DigEino **仓库根目录**下新建 **`render/`**，与现有的 `tools/`、`learning/`、`webhook/` 等**同级**。  
- **导入路径**：`github.com/originaleric/digeino/render`（与根上唯一的 `go.module` 一致）。

### 为什么不放在 `tools/` 里

- `tools/` 表示 **给大模型用的 Tool**；渲染是 **宿主侧管线**，放在根目录的 `render/` 更清晰，也符合「以后整包拆出去开源」的边界。

### Eino 薄适配放哪

- **不要**放进 `render/`（避免核心包依赖 eino）。  
- 推荐：**`internal/rendereino/`**，专门做 `schema.Message` → 字符串 → `render.Parse`，只在 DigEino 内部引用。

若你更倾向用 `pkg/render` 这种约定也可以，但计划里默认是根目录 **`render/`**，和现有包结构最直观。

` - so we need to find open tag, then search for close tag in remainder, but if we hit a code fence before close, that's weird - treat as thinking content still.

Algorithm for thinking:
- When in normal/thinking mode (not in code), scan for first occurrence of any open tag from options
- If found before next ``` fence line, enter thinking until close tag

Order of operations per segment:
1. From position i, look for earliest of: (a) ``` at line start, (b) any thinking open tag
2. If ``` first (and we're at line granularity): start code
3. If thinking open first: start thinking until close

Let me implement a straightforward version:

```go
func Parse(input string, opts Options) ([]Block, error) {
    if opts.ThinkingTagPairs == nil {
        opts.ThinkingTagPairs = DefaultThinkingTagPairs()
    }
    // normalize line endings to \n for internal processing
    input = strings.ReplaceAll(input, "\r\n", "\n")
    input = strings.ReplaceAll(input, "\r", "\n")
    
    return parseLines(input, opts)
}
```

parseLines:
- i := 0, lines := strings.Split(input, "\n") but we lose exact positions - use strings.SplitSeq or manual

I'll use strings.Split and track that content between lines uses "\n" as joiner.

```go
lines := strings.Split(input, "\n")
var blocks []Block
var mdLines []string

flushMD := func() {
    if len(mdLines) > 0 {
        blocks = append(blocks, Block{Kind: BlockKindMarkdown, Content: strings.Join(mdLines, "\n")})
        mdLines = nil
    }
}

li := 0
for li < len(lines) {
    line := lines[li]
    trimmed := strings.TrimSpace(line)
    
    // code fence: opening ``` or closing
    if strings.HasPrefix(trimmed, "```") {
        if !inCode {
            // open
            inCode = true
            flushMD()
            lang := strings.TrimSpace(trimmed[3:])
            codeLang = lang
            codeLines = nil
            li++
            continue
        } else {
            // close - same line only ``` 
            if trimmed == "```" || strings.HasPrefix(trimmed, "```") && len(trimmed) == 3 {
                flush code block
                inCode = false
                li++
                continue
            }
        }
    }
    ...
}
```

Closing fence: line where after trim left, the line is exactly ``` or starts with ``` and rest is empty/whitespace.

Opening: ```lang optional

Inside code: append line to codeLines (including the content lines, not including open/close fence lines)

Let me also handle thinking: when !inCode, check if line contains opening tag - could be `<think>` mid-line. For simplicity, use strings.Contains on remainder of input from current position... 

Easier approach: regex for thinking - fragile. Use explicit tag pairs.

For each line when !inCode && !inThinking:
- Try to find if current accumulated or this line starts thinking - actually thinking can start mid-line after some text.

Example: "Hello `<think>` reasoning `` world" - rare. Common is:
```
`<think>`
reasoning
`
Answer here
```

I'll support:
1. Thinking block on its own lines (open tag can be at end of markdown line or start new line)
2. Scan: join remaining lines from li into string, find earliest open tag among pairs, if any before ``` occurrence

This gets complex. Simpler MVP:
- Thinking only recognized when a **line** (trimmed) **starts with** or **equals** open tag OR the open tag appears as complete token at line start after optional whitespace
- Close tag on line where trimmed is close tag or line contains only close tag

Actually many models output:
```
`<think>`
...
`
```

I'll look for open tag as substring starting at current offset in full text, with rule: not inside code fence.

Implementation: 
1. Build list of code fence ranges [startByte, endByte] exclusive of delimiters
2. Scan bytes for thinking tags only outside those ranges
3. Merge ranges: markdown | thinking | code in order

Step 1: find fence ranges
```go
func findCodeFenceRanges(s string) [][2]int {
    lines := strings.Split(s, "\n")
    var ranges [][2]int
    inFence := false
    var startByte int
    byteOff := 0
    for _, line := range lines {
        t := strings.TrimSpace(line)
        if !inFence {
            if strings.HasPrefix(t, "```") {
                inFence = true
                startByte = byteOff + len(line) + 1 // after this line? content starts next line
                // actually content start is byte after newline following opening fence line
                startByte = byteOff + len(line) + 1
            }
        } else {
            if t == "```" || (strings.HasPrefix(t, "```") && strings.TrimSpace(t[3:]) == "") {
                // end at byteOff (start of closing line)
                ranges = append(ranges, [2]int{contentStart, byteOff})
                inFence = false
            }
        }
        byteOff += len(line) + 1
    }
    return ranges
}

```
package schema // import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema"

type Message struct {
	Role RoleType &#96;json:"role"&#96;

	// Content is for user text input and model text output.
	Content string &#96;json:"content"&#96;

	// if MultiContent is not empty, use this instead of Content
	// if MultiContent is empty, use Content
	// Deprecated: Use UserInputMultiContent for user multimodal inputs and AssistantGenMultiContent for model multimodal outputs.
	MultiContent []ChatMessagePart &#96;json:"multi_content,omitempty"&#96;

	// UserInputMultiContent passes multimodal content provided by the user to the model.
	UserInputMultiContent []MessageInputPart &#96;json:"user_input_multi_content,omitempty"&#96;

	// AssistantGenMultiContent is for receiving multimodal output from the model.
	AssistantGenMultiContent []MessageOutputPart &#96;json:"assistant_output_multi_content,omitempty"&#96;

	Name string &#96;json:"name,omitempty"&#96;

	// only for AssistantMessage
	ToolCalls []ToolCall &#96;json:"tool_calls,omitempty"&#96;

	// only for ToolMessage
	ToolCallID string &#96;json:"tool_call_id,omitempty"&#96;
	// only for ToolMessage
	ToolName string &#96;json:"tool_name,omitempty"&#96;

	ResponseMeta *ResponseMeta &#96;json:"response_meta,omitempty"&#96;

	// ReasoningContent is the thinking process of the model, which will be included when the model returns reasoning content.
	ReasoningContent string &#96;json:"reasoning_content,omitempty"&#96;

	// customized information for model implementation
	Extra map[string]any &#96;json:"extra,omitempty"&#96;
}
    Message denotes the data structure for model input and output, originating
    from either user input or model return. It supports both text-only and
    multimodal content.

```

package schema // import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema"

type ToolCall struct {
	// Index is used when there are multiple tool calls in a message.
	// In stream mode, it's used to identify the chunk of the tool call for merging.
	Index *int &#96;json:"index,omitempty"&#96;
	// ID is the id of the tool call, it can be used to identify the specific tool call.
	ID string &#96;json:"id"&#96;
	// Type is the type of the tool call, default is "function".
	Type string &#96;json:"type"&#96;
	// Function is the function call to be made.
	Function FunctionCall &#96;json:"function"&#96;

	// Extra is used to store extra information for the tool call.
	Extra map[string]any &#96;json:"extra,omitempty"&#96;
}
    ToolCall is the tool call in a message. It's used in Assistant Message when
    there are tool calls should be made.


```

```go
func findStableThinkingCut(s string, pairs []ThinkingTagPair) int {

``` - The `findStableThinkingCut` function processes a string to determine the stable parsing boundary by analyzing pairs of thinking tags.
- For each pair, it finds the last closing tag and examines the tail after it.
- If an opening tag is found in the tail without a corresponding closing tag, the function marks that position as the stable cut point.
- If no unclosed opening tag is found, the entire string is considered stable.
- The function iterates through all pairs to ensure proper handling of nested or multiple thinking blocks. The `ParseStablePrefix` function processes input to return blocks for the longest structurally complete prefix, ensuring all fences are closed and no thinking tags are left unclosed at the end.

- Scans input line-by-line to track fence state.
- Identifies incomplete fences and returns byte index of opening fence if unclosed.
- Verifies trailing content has balanced thinking blocks.
- Returns blocks and remainder when input is fully parseable. - The `stableCut` function determines the longest structurally complete prefix of input by first checking for incomplete fences and then verifying balanced thinking blocks.
- If an incomplete fence is found, it returns the byte index of the opening fence.
- Otherwise, it ensures trailing content has balanced thinking blocks and returns the stable cut point.
- `fenceStableCut` scans lines to detect incomplete fences and returns the line number of the incomplete fence.
- `thinkingStableCut` verifies that all thinking blocks are properly closed and returns the byte index of the stable cut point.</details></think>

实现已按计划落地，摘要如下。

## 已实现内容

### `pkg/render`（核心，无 eino）
- **`block.go`**：`Block`、`BlockKind`（`markdown` / `thinking` / `code`）
- **`options.go`**：`Options`、`ThinkingTagPair`、`DefaultThinkingTagPairs()`、校验
- **`parse.go`**：`Parse` — 先按 **围栏代码** 切段，再在文本段内按 **思考标签** 递归拆分；`mergeAdjacentMarkdown`、`trimEmptyBlocks`
- **`prefix.go`**：`ParseStablePrefix` → `PrefixResult{Blocks, Remainder}`，供流式「稳定前缀」解析（未闭合围栏 / 未闭合 thinking 会留在 `Remainder`）
- **`parse_test.go` / `prefix_test.go`**：覆盖常见与边界情况

### `pkg/render/html`
- **`html.go`**：`BlocksToHTML`（goldmark + bluemonday）、`WrapDocument`（含简单样式）
- **`html_test.go`**

### `pkg/render/eino`（`package rendereino`）
- **`message.go`**：`MessageToRenderableText`（`ReasoningContent` → ``、`ToolCalls` 附录）、`ParseMessage`
- **`message_test.go`**

### DigEino 集成
- **`internal/renderexport/export.go`**：`SaveAssistantHTML` → `tempstorage.SaveForReview`

### 文档
- **`pkg/render/README.md`**：分包说明、流式用法、拆独立 module 建议、CI 约束建议

### 依赖
- 已在根 `go.mod` 增加 **`github.com/yuin/goldmark`**、**`github.com/microcosm-cc/bluemonday`**（`pkg/render` 与 `pkg/render/html` 仍不引用 eino）。

全量测试：`go test ./...` 已通过。

**说明**：未增加 `InferTool` / `BaseTools` 注册（与方案一致：渲染不走模型 Tool）。若要在 `StatusCollector.OnComplete` 里挂结构化块，可在宿主里调用 `rendereino.ParseMessage` 或 `render.Parse`，README 里已写明。

简要回答如下，并已写入 [`pkg/render/README.md`](pkg/render/README.md) 的 **「支持的格式与自定义」** 一节，方便以后对照。

---

**目前支持哪些「渲染」？**

分两层理解：

1. **结构化解析（`Parse`）**  
   只会拆成三类块：`markdown`、`thinking`、`code`。  
   - 正文：与围栏、思考标签错开后的连续文本。  
   - 思考：由 **成对标签** 包住（默认见 `DefaultThinkingTagPairs`，也可自己配）。  
   - 代码：**仅** 标准 Markdown 那种 **单独一行的三反引号围栏**，闭合后带可选语言名。

2. **转成 HTML（`pkg/render/html`）**  
   - Markdown 块 → goldmark → bluemonday 消毒。  
   - 思考 → 转义后放进 `<aside class="llm-thinking">`。  
   - 代码 → 转义后 `<pre><code class="language-xxx">`，**不做** Shiki/Prism 高亮。

---

**可以自定义格式吗？**

- **可以（不改库）**：用 `Options.ThinkingTagPairs` 增删、替换思考区标签，适配不同模型输出。  
- **代码围栏样式、块类型种类**：当前 **没有** 通过 `Options` 配置；要换规则需要改解析逻辑或自己拿 `[]Block` 再渲染。

---

**可以自行维护和添加吗？**

- **可以**：代码在本仓库里，可自行 fork/改 `pkg/render`（例如新 `BlockKind`、可配置围栏、自定义 `BlocksToHTML`），也可以向 DigEino 提 PR。  
- 若只要 **别的 HTML/CSS/高亮**：不必改库，对 `[]Block` 自己遍历生成页面即可。

如果你希望把「围栏字符可配置」或「第四种块类型」做成正式 API，可以再说一下优先级，我可以按你的场景拆一版改动方案。

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to add a configuration. The user wants to add a YAML configuration file in pkg/render to define rendering options, including thinking tag pairs, fence characters, and block types. The configuration should support loading from embedded filesystem or file path.

- Design YAML config structure for rendering options
- Implement loading functionality (OptionsFromFile, LoadConfig, or merge with Options)
- Keep core usable without YAML dependencies (gopkg.in/yaml.v3 already present in go.mod) Adding yaml.v3 introduces a dependency in the render package, which is acceptable for the DigEino module. The configuration can be stored as an embedded default in pkg/render/config.yaml with support for loading from a path. The RenderConfig struct will include ThinkingTagPairs in YAML format.

YAML example:
```yaml
thinking_tags:
  - open: "<tool_call>"
    close: "<tool_call>"
  - open: "<reasoning>"
    close: "</reasoning>"
```

Default configuration should read embedded YAML or use hardcoded values for zero file dependency. A LoadConfig function will handle loading from a file path. The user wants to add a configuration file named `config.yml` in the `render` directory. This file will define rendering options such as thinking tag pairs, fence characters, and block types. The configuration supports loading from an embedded filesystem or a file path.

- Define YAML config structure for rendering options
- Implement loading functionality (LoadOptionsFromFile, LoadOptionsFromReader)
- Keep core usable without YAML dependencies
- Embed default configuration as `config.default.yaml` in `pkg/render`
- Update README in Chinese The configuration file `config.yaml` will be placed in the `pkg/render` directory and committed to the repository. It supports both embedded default loading and runtime loading from the current working directory.

- Embed default configuration as `pkg/render/config/default.yaml` using `go:embed` for `DefaultOptionsFromConfig()`
- Add `LoadOptionsFromFile(path string) (Options, error)` for custom file path loading
- Document usage in README with snake_case YAML keys mapping to Go struct fields with yaml tags

```go
type fileConfig struct {
    ThinkingTagPairs []struct {
``` - LoadOptionsFromFile reads a YAML file and returns Options, handling empty files by using defaults.
- OptionsFromYAML unmarshals YAML data into Options, applying default values for missing fields like thinking_tag_pairs.
- DefaultThinkingTagPairs() provides fallback values when thinking_tag_pairs are not specified in the YAML. If the YAML config contains thinking tag pairs, they are copied to the options; otherwise, default pairs are used. Validation ensures the options are valid before returning. For embedding, a default YAML file is loaded using `go:embed`, and `DefaultOptionsFromEmbeddedConfig()` returns the embedded configuration after processing. The default YAML configuration should serve as the single source of truth for default thinking tag pairs, avoiding duplication with Go code. This can be achieved by either:

- Removing the duplicate Go definition and relying solely on the embedded YAML (with risk if embedding fails)
- Keeping the Go default and using embedded YAML as documentation that must stay synchronized

Best approach: Use embedded default.yaml as the single source for default tags; `DefaultThinkingTagPairs()` can read from embedded YAML or lazily initialize once using `sync.Once`. The configuration file `config/default.yaml` will be added to the repository with the same thinking tag pairs as the current Go defaults. The `DefaultThinkingTagPairs()` function will remain unchanged for backward compatibility, but can be refactored in the future to load from the embedded YAML on first call using `sync.Once`. This ensures a single source of truth while maintaining existing behavior.

- Keep `DefaultThinkingTagPairs()` as-is for backward compatibility
- Refactor to load embedded YAML on first use with `sync.Once` for cleaner long-term solution
- `config/default.yaml` mirrors current Go defaults for consistency</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
In older versions of Go, sync.OnceValues returned (V, bool). In Go 1.21+, `sync.OnceValues` only supports a single return value. For functions returning multiple values like `([]ThinkingTagPair, error)`, a custom approach is needed using `sync.Once` to cache both the slice and error.

- Use `sync.Once` to ensure the function runs only once
- Cache both the result slice and error
- Return the cached values on subsequent calls The code uses `sync.Once` to ensure `loadDefaultPairs` runs only once, caching both the resulting slice and any error. On subsequent calls, it returns the cached results or a fallback if an error occurred or no pairs were loaded.</details></think>

## 实现概要

1. **`pkg/render/config/default.yaml`**  
   - 默认 `thinking_tag_pairs` 列表，与原先 Go 里写死的三组标签一致。  
   - 通过 **`go:embed`** 打进二进制，`DefaultThinkingTagPairs()` 优先从这里读；解析失败时仍回退到硬编码，避免静默坏掉。

2. **`pkg/render/config.go`**  
   - `OptionsFromYAML([]byte)`  
   - `LoadOptionsFromFile(path)` — 业务里可指向任意路径，例如 `config/render/config.yml`  
   - `LoadOptionsFromReader(io.Reader)`  
   - `LoadEmbeddedDefaultOptions()` — 显式使用嵌入的 `default.yaml`  

3. **语义**（与 README 表格一致）  
   - 省略或 `thinking_tag_pairs: null` → 得到零值 `Options`，`Parse` 时 `withDefaults` 仍用嵌入默认。  
   - `thinking_tag_pairs: []` → **关闭**思考区识别。

4. **`pkg/render/config/config.example.yml`**  
   - 给业务仓库复制改名（如 `config.yml`）用的示例。

5. **`pkg/render/config_test.go`**  
   - 覆盖上述行为及与嵌入默认的一致性。

6. **`pkg/render/README.md`**  
   - 新增 **「0. YAML 配置」**，并说明：**当前 YAML 只配 `thinking_tag_pairs`**；代码围栏等仍在代码里固定，后续可在同一文件扩展字段并在 `Options` 里承接。

依赖仍使用模块里已有的 **`gopkg.in/yaml.v3`**，未新增模块依赖。

## 2. 在 `config.yaml` 里写全「当前支持」的内容

文件中除 **`thinking_tag_pairs`**（仍由解析器加载）外，还用注释集中说明了当前实现已支持的能力：

| 区块 | 内容 |

| 注释 | **Parse / ParseStablePrefix**：`markdown` / `thinking` / `code` 含义，代码围栏（CommonMark ```）规则，流式 `Remainder` 行为 |
| 注释 | **pkg/render/html**：goldmark、bluemonday、各块对应 HTML 结构 |
| 注释 | **pkg/render/eino**：`ReasoningContent`、`ToolCalls` 如何拼进可解析文本 |
| 注释占位 | `code_fence` / `html` 子键示例（标明**尚未**从 YAML 读入，便于以后扩展） |
| `thinking_tag_pairs` | 与原先一致的三组默认标签 |

_**Agent (default)**_

简要说明如下（并已写入 [`pkg/render/config/config.yaml`](pkg/render/config/config.yaml) 里的注释）：

## `open` / `close` 管什么？

只管 **解析**：在原始字符串里 **识别边界**，把中间内容变成 `Block{Kind: thinking, Content: "..."}`。  
这里 **没有** 颜色、字体、折叠样式等概念——那是 **展示层** 的事。

## 「样式」从哪来？

1. **走 `pkg/render/html` 的 `BlocksToHTML`**  
   - 每种 `BlockKind` 在 Go 里 **写死** 成一段 HTML 结构（例如 thinking 用 `<aside class="llm-thinking">`、`<pre class="llm-thinking-pre">`）。  
   - 具体 **视觉效果** 靠页面上的 **CSS** 选这些 class；要换结构需要改 `html` 包或不用它。

2. **自研 UI（React / Vue / 桌面等）**  
   - 直接用 `[]Block`，按 `kind` 自己映射组件和主题，**完全不依赖** 这份 YAML 里的样式字段。

所以：**config.yaml 里只有 open/close 是正常的**——它配置的是「按什么标签切思考区」，不是「思考区怎么画」。若以后要在 YAML 里配 class/CSS 变量，需要扩展 `Options` 和 `BlocksToHTML`（注释里已提了一句预留方向）。

The HTML rendering settings should be loaded from a new `html:` section in config.yaml, with separate keys for wrapper elements, classes, and code blocks. The configuration should support customizing wrapper tags, CSS classes for different elements, and code block formatting. The markdown rendering should also allow configuring the goldmark parser and bluemonday policy levels. The HTML rendering logic should be configured via minimal, structural fields in config.yaml, focusing on wrapper tags, class names, and sanitization policy. This includes defining wrapper elements and classes for thinking and code blocks, with escape strings enabled by default. The configuration supports customizable tags and classes while maintaining backward compatibility. Goldmark extensions are not included in this initial scope. The markdown rendering uses UGCPolicy by default, with options to switch to StrictPolicy or custom policies. Implementation involves adding an `HTMLPresentation` or `HTMLRenderOptions` struct in `pkg/render` with YAML tags, and extending `renderYAML` in `config.go` to handle the new configuration structure. The HTML rendering settings will be loaded from a new `html:` section in `config.yaml`, supporting customization of wrapper tags, CSS classes, and sanitization policy levels. This approach maintains backward compatibility while enabling flexible HTML output configuration.

- Add `HTMLPresentation` struct with YAML tags in `pkg/render`
- Extend `renderYAML` in `config.go` to support new HTML rendering options
- Load HTML rendering settings from `html:` section in `config.yaml`
- Support sanitization policy levels: ugc, strict, none
- Maintain backward compatibility with default embedded YAML HTML rendering configuration is now defined under a new `html:` section in `config.yaml`, containing nested structures for `thinking`, `code`, and `markdown` settings. The `OptionsFromYAML` function needs to be updated to return both `Options` and `HTMLRenderConfig`, or embed HTML config into a new `RenderConfig` struct. The `BlocksToHTML` function will accept optional `htmlOpts` which defaults to embedded defaults when nil. // HTMLRenderConfig controls BlocksToHTML output structure (from YAML html: section).
type HTMLRenderConfig struct {
    Thinking HTMLThinkingRender `yaml:"thinking"`
    Code     HTMLCodeRender     `yaml:"code"`
    Markdown HTMLMarkdownRender `yaml:"markdown"`
}

type HTMLThinkingRender struct {
    WrapperTag    string `yaml:"wrapper_tag"`     // default "aside"
    WrapperClass  string `yaml:"wrapper_class"`
    ContentTag    string `yaml:"content_tag"`     // default "pre"
    ContentClass  string `yaml:"content_class"`
}

type HTMLCodeRender struct {
    PreClass            string `yaml:"pre_class"`
} The HTML rendering configuration now includes support for customizing code block classes and language prefixes, with validation to prevent XSS by restricting wrapper tags to a whitelist of safe options like aside, div, and section. Content tags are limited to pre and div. Default values are embedded in config.yaml to maintain backward compatibility. The configuration allows specifying wrapper tags, classes, and content tags for thinking and code blocks, ensuring secure and flexible HTML output generation. The HTML rendering configuration is now defined in a `RenderConfig` struct within `pkg/render`, which bundles both parsing and HTML rendering options. The `HTMLRenderConfig` struct is placed in `pkg/render/html` to avoid import cycles, with YAML loading handled in `pkg/render/config.go`. This approach ensures clean separation of concerns while maintaining backward compatibility. The `HTMLPresentationConfig` struct is defined in `pkg/render/presentation.go` with YAML tags, unmarshaled as part of the root YAML in `config.go`. It drives the `pkg/render/html.BlocksToHTML` function when non-nil, avoiding import cycles by having the HTML package accept it as a parameter type. This enables flexible HTML rendering configuration while maintaining backward compatibility. The `HTMLPresentationConfig` struct defines HTML rendering options with YAML tags for thinking, code, and markdown sections. The thinking section specifies wrapper and content tags and classes. This configuration supports customizable HTML output with secure defaults.</details></think>

- Implement merging logic for HTML defaults in `normalizeHTMLPresentation`
- Add `Thinking` field to `HTMLPresentationConfig` with appropriate YAML tags The HTML presentation config includes nested structs for different content types:  
- `HTMLCodePresentation` with fields `PreClass` and `LanguageClassPrefix`  
- `HTMLMarkdownPresentation` with fields `WrapperTag`, `WrapperClass`, `ContentTag`, and `ContentClass`  
- `HTMLDocumentPresentation` with optional inline CSS for `WrapDocument`  
- `HTMLThinkingPresentation` with fields `WrapperTag`, `WrapperClass`, `ContentTag`, and `ContentClass`  

Each struct uses YAML tags for proper unmarshaling and includes default values where applicable. The HTMLMarkdownPresentation struct now includes a SanitizePolicy field for controlling markup sanitization levels.

The HTMLDocumentPresentation struct supports optional inline CSS and language specification.

Security considerations include validating wrapper and content tags against a whitelist, with special handling for code blocks to ensure safe rendering. I'll allow `pre_class` and `code_inner` with the structure fixed as `<pre class="..."><code class="language-xx">`.

- Allow `wrapper_tag` (aside, div, section) and `content_tag` (pre, div) for Thinking.
- Defaults when empty strings after merge:
  - thinking: aside, llm-thinking, pre, llm-thinking-pre
  - code: llm-code, language-
  - markdown: ugc
  - document: default CSS string from current WrapDocument

- `WrapDocument` needs to accept optional `*HTMLPresentationConfig` for custom CSS or add `WrapDocumentWithConfig(title, body, doc *HTMLDocumentPresentation)`.

- I'll put `Document` section in yaml:
```yaml
document:
``` If `inline_css` is empty, the built-in default CSS will be used instead of the provided one.

The `parseFullConfig` helper function will unmarshal the entire YAML configuration file into a `configFileYAML` struct.

- Export `EmbeddedHTMLPresentation()` which loads the embedded HTML presentation config using `sync.Once`.
- Create `pkg/render/html_pres.go` containing type definitions and `DefaultHTMLPresentation()` that returns merged defaults.
- Update `config.go` to incorporate these changes and support full configuration parsing.</details></think>

Add to config.go:
